---
pagetitle: "Talks | Jubayer Hossain"
title: Talks 
excerpt: "A list of selected talks of me"
toc-location: right
page-layout: full
---

Below you can find a list of selected talks of me and my group,along with slides, paper references, and recordings when available.
Presenters are highlighted in **bold**.

- **Hossain, M.J.** (2024). 
Invited talk: *Mastering Biomedical Data Management*.
Presented at [IFMSA Bangladesh](#).
[Slides](pdf/statistical_perspective_on_sbi.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}

- **Hossain, M.J.** (2022). 
Invited talk: *Undergraduate Research - Importance, Benefits, and Challenges*.
Presented at [CHIRAL Bangladesh](#).
[Slides](pdf/statistical_perspective_on_sbi.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}

- **Hossain, M.J.** (2022). 
Academic talk: *State the Art of Microbial Genome Analysis*.
Presented at [Jagannath University](#).
[Slides](pdf/statistical_perspective_on_sbi.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}
